category_sources: source_facts.description says Microsoft SQL Server command-line interface; official GitHub README says the repo contains the sqlcmd command-line tool for Microsoft SQL Server, Azure SQL Database, and Azure Synapse.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is sqlcmd; official GitHub README and Microsoft Learn docs use sqlcmd.
docs_sources: Microsoft Learn is the dedicated official documentation for sqlcmd utility usage and distinguishes sqlcmd Go; official GitHub README and wiki document the Go implementation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/microsoft/go-sqlcmd, so repo is null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README identify a SQL Server CLI; Microsoft Learn covers sqlcmd utility usage and Go variant; source_facts.executables lists sqlcmd.
